def positive_python_perf_layer_garbage_collection_cleanup_lru_cache_on_unbounded_argument_space():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_garbage_collection_cleanup_lru_cache_on_unbounded_argument_space"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Layer: Garbage collection and cleanup. Flag lru_cache usage without maxsize on functions fed user-controlled or high-cardinality inputs."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
